name: Very Smooth Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes. Cool.
3. Soften gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
4. Combine cream cheese and sugar, mixing at medium speed on electric mixer until well blended.
5. Drain strawberries, reserving liquid. Add enough milk to the liquid to measure 1 cup.
6. Gradually add the combined milk mixture and gelatin to the cream cheese, mixing until well blended.
7. Chill until slightly thickened.
8. Fold in whipped cream and strawberries; pour over crust.
9. Chill until firm.
VARIATION:
Substitute 1 Cup Vanilla Wafer Crumbs, 1/2 cup chopped nuts, 2 tablespoons of sugar and 2 tablespoons of margarine for graham cracker crumbs, sugar and margarine.
